segments.text: Make haste, O God, to deliver me! O LORD, make haste to help me!
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: to help: Heb. to my help

segments.text: Let those be put to shame and disappointed altogether who seek my life! Let those be turned back and brought to dishonor who delight in my hurt!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let them turn back because of their shame who say, 'Aha, Aha!'
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May all who seek you rejoice and be glad in you! May those who love your salvation say evermore, 'God is great!'
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But I am poor and needy; hasten to me, O God! You are my help and my deliverer; O LORD, do not delay!
segments.speaker: David
